sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ خَالِدٌ أَنْ يَفْتَحَ مَخْبَزًا صَغِيرًا فِي حَيِّهِ.
sentences.translation: Halid je odlučio otvoriti malu pekaru u svom naselju.
sentences.translationEn: Khalid decided to open a small bakery in his neighborhood.

sentences.arabic: دَرَسَ السُّوقَ جَيِّدًا قَبْلَ الْبَدْءِ فِي مَشْرُوعِهِ الْخَاصِّ.
sentences.translation: Dobro je proučio tržište prije nego što je započeo svoj privatni projekat.
sentences.translationEn: He studied the market well before starting his private project.

sentences.arabic: الْآنَ، يَبِيعُ الْخُبْزَ الطَّازَجَ لِكَثِيرٍ مِنَ الزَّبَائِنِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Sada svaki dan prodaje svježi hljeb mnogim kupcima.
sentences.translationEn: Now, he sells fresh bread to many customers every day.
